name: 🔥 Hard — No Mercy
description: Short windows, 20% potty success, mercy disabled, push-to-leak forced on. For experienced players only.

customMicroEvents.label: Brace Break
customMicroEvents.flow: You lock down hard, but the strain turns into a sharp forced spurt.

customMicroEvents.label: Cough Collapse
customMicroEvents.flow: A sudden body jolt strips away your control for a hot second.

customMicroEvents.label: Edge Failure
customMicroEvents.flow: You ride the edge too long and a small but stubborn leak forces its way out.

customFullEvents.label: No Mercy Surge
customFullEvents.flow: Once the surge starts, you are past the point of saving anything.

customFullEvents.label: Point Of No Return
customFullEvents.flow: A hard push becomes a complete emptying with no chance to stop.
